name: Urstadt Biddle Properties Inc. 5.875% Series K Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: Urstadt Biddle Properties Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on owning and operating community shopping centers in the United States, and UBP^K represents another series of their cumulative redeemable preferred stock. Similar to UBP^H, this preferred stock provides a fixed dividend yield and has liquidation preference over common stock. The company's headquarters are located in Greenwich, Connecticut.
